infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Fresh Bazar Rider uses your location while you are on duty so dispatch can assign nearby orders and monitor delivery progress.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Fresh Bazar Rider tracks your location while you are on duty — including in the background — so dispatch can monitor riders and customers can follow their order after it is assigned to you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The camera is used to take a photo of the delivered order as proof of delivery.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The photo library is used to attach an existing photo as proof of delivery.
